ab: ullaya ku risarisan a misasa. i Langutr tu ngalad. marayas abalu kemasu dra manay driya dar.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Langutr，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Langutr, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: an temakakesi ta dar i, kibulas kana risarisan dra tratruri, dra iyasaus. adri i, dra tatilillan.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: pariyasall, parepuwan, paretelun. tu pabulasay dra trau peniya.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次。大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: amawna, adri inaba tu kakuwayanan. an kibulas dra manay driya i, marayas dar adri parebabeliyas.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: likudran lla i, adri maranger pabulas dra manay driya a trau kantaw.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: ullaya a saya wari. sallangallangan mi paniya muka muwadrangiya.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: a kadru mi driya i dalan i, maranger muka i puwatriyan i Langutr. amawna, abalu kemasu kana kadupu na aitrul.
ch: 路途中，Langutr想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Langutr wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: kibulas dra risarisan kana kadupu na aitrul i, tu tubangaw dra trau peniya dra, “adri ku kemasu i!”
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說：「我也沒有帶耶！」
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: tu aleduan kan Langutr i, matrangis. salaw illemes aw, “daw adri mu muwai pabulas kanku kana kadupu na aitrul kema?
ch: Langutr急的哭了出來。他生氣的說：「為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙？」
en: Langutr burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: tu babatiaw dra risarisan. amau yuyu na adri kemakasu. aw an kibulas yu dra manay driya i, adri yu parebabeliyas!
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: dra dadaman i, semaball muka i takasian i Langutr. tu kinibulasan na manay driya i, tu parebeliyasanay kana risarisan.
ch: 隔天上學，Langutr很早就到學校了，Langutr把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Langutr arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: semungal kana risarisan i Langutr aw, “igelayan! likudran i, kuykuya na kemasu dra manay driya.” “adru a kiyabulas ku kanemu i, mu pabulasay ku dra manay driya. semangalan kemaya ku driya kanemu.” kema.
ch: Langutr向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Langutr apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
